action.reasoning: Observation: Training failed with ValueError in ic_eval (arrays not same length) due to feval being called on both train and valid sets (valid_dates only matches valid). Previous best ic_mean=0.0368 with full-train 1000 trees. Analysis: Custom IC feval is correct direction for target metric but needs length guard for train-set calls; MSE not aligned with IC so early-stop on valid IC (2021) should improve test generalization. Decision: Fix ic_eval with length check (dummy for train, real IC for valid), use valid_dates.values, set 2000 rounds/lr=0.02/early_stop=100 on IC, keep logging; rerun train.py then submit_eval.
